2604.21903.title: A Scale-Adaptive Framework for Joint Spatiotemporal Super-Resolution with Diffusion Models
2604.21903.paper_summary: Deep-learning video super-resolution has progressed rapidly, but climate applications typically super-resolve (increase resolution) either space or time, and joint spatiotemporal models are often designed for a single pair of super-resolution (SR) factors (upscaling spatial and temporal ratio between the low-resolution sequence and the high-resolution sequence), limiting transfer across spatial resolutions and temporal cadences (frame rates). We present a scale-adaptive framework that reuses the same architecture across factors by decomposing spatiotemporal SR into a deterministic prediction of the conditional mean, with attention, and a residual conditional diffusion model, with an optional mass-conservation (same precipitation amount in inputs and outputs) transform to preserve aggregated totals. Assuming that larger SR factors primarily increase underdetermination (hence required context and residual uncertainty) rather than changing the conditional-mean structure, scale adaptivity is achieved by retuning three factor-dependent hyperparameters before retraining: the diffusion noise schedule amplitude beta (larger for larger factors to increase diversity), the temporal context length L (set to maintain comparable attention horizons across cadences) and optionally a third, the mass-conservation function f (tapered to limit the amplification of extremes for large factors). Demonstrated on reanalysis precipitation over France (Comephore), the same architecture spans super-resolution factors from 1 to 25 in space and 1 to 6 in time, yielding a reusable architecture and tuning recipe for joint spatiotemporal super-resolution across scales.
2604.21903.paper_summary_zh: 深度學習視頻超解析度發展迅速，但氣候應用通常只在空間或時間上進行超解析（提高解析度），而聯合時空模型通常是為單一對超解析（SR）因子（在低解析度序列和高解析度序列之間的空間和時間比例上採用放大）設計的，這限制了在空間解析度和時間頻率（幀率）之間的轉移。我們提出了一個可調整比例的框架，通過將時空SR分解為帶有注意力的條件均值的確定性預測和帶有可選質量守恆（輸入和輸出中的降水量相同）變換的殘差條件擴散模型，來重用相同的架構以應對不同的因子。假設較大的SR因子主要增加欠確定性（因此需要上下文和殘差不確定性），而不是改變條件均值結構，通過在重新訓練之前重新調整三個因子依賴的超參數來實現比例適應性：擴散噪聲計劃幅度beta（對於較大的因子增大以增加多樣性）、時間上下文長度L（設置為在頻率之間維持可比較的注意力範圍）和可選的第三個，質量守恆函數f（減少對於大因子的極端增幅）。在法國的再分析降水（Comephore）上進行演示，該架構跨越了空間上從1到25和時間上從1到6的超解析因子，產生了一個可重用的架構和調整配方，以實現跨尺度的聯合時空超解析。
2604.21903.author: Max Defez et.al.
2604.21903.authors: Max Defez, Filippo Quarenghi, Mathieu Vrac, Stephan Mandt, Tom Beucler
